# Git Master

This skill carries over OMO's bias toward clean, intentional commits.

## Rules

- Commit coherent changes together.
- Do not create a single giant commit for unrelated work.
- Pair implementation with the tests or docs that justify it when practical.
- Use descriptive commit messages.

## Commit questions

- What changed?
- Why did it change?
- Is this one logical unit or multiple?
- What evidence says it is ready to commit?
